case_title: NICHOLAS JAMES MAFFEI VS. MICHAEL SCHEELE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEELE, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAFFEI, NICHOLAS JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHEELE, MICHAEL $2,990.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,070.00, THE JUDGMENTS REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $800.00 FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES AND PERSONAL INJURIES AS PREVIOUSLY AGREED BETWEEN THE PARTIES, AND $2190.00 FOR LOSS OF WORK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,173.24 FILED BY MAFFEI, NICHOLAS JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEELE, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
